title: Packaging Corp (PKG) Faces Headwinds From Low Paper Volumes
text: Packaging Corp's (PKG) results bear the brunt of weak packaging demand and lower paper volumes.

title: Packaging Corporation of America Schedules Conference Call to Discuss Second Quarter 2023 Operating Results
text: LAKE FOREST, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Packaging Corporation of America (NYSE: PKG) will hold a conference call on Tuesday, July 25, 2023 at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time to discuss second quarter 2023 results. The conference call leader will be Mark Kowlzan. Second quarter earnings results will be released after the market closes on Monday, July 24, 2023. title: Packaging Corp (PKG) Declines 20% in a Year: Will It Recover?
text: Decline in volumes and headwinds from elevated costs are hurting Packaging Corp's (PKG) performance.
